etymology.sol: Solid / Solution (Physical world, solid-state physics, metallurgical alloys)
etymology.bion: Bionic / Biological (Software orchestration, active learning, autonomous adaptation)

positioning.statement: The autonomous engine for materials discovery. A data factory for the physical world.
positioning.core_philosophy: Moving away from sequential, human-driven trial-and-error toward closed-loop Bayesian optimization and active learning.
positioning.value_proposition: 10x speed-to-data, drastic cost reduction per formulation, and complete mapping of the physical multi-dimensional chemical space.

primary_background.name: Warm Clinical Light
primary_background.usage: Main background, bright and welcoming laboratory environment

secondary_background.name: Light Grey Slate
secondary_background.usage: Secondary background sections and structural blocks

card_surface.name: Pure White
card_surface.usage: Elevated card elements and interface surfaces

primary_text.name: Slate Heading
primary_text.usage: Primary headings, titles, high contrast typography

accent_action.name: Lab Teal
accent_action.usage: Primary buttons, active links, hover actions, branding accents

secondary_highlight.name: Terracotta Amber
secondary_highlight.usage: Secondary action indicators, highlight nodes, status badges

baseline_border.name: Soft Grey
baseline_border.usage: Delicate border dividers, grid lines, visual hierarchy separators

headers.style: Clean, spacious tracking, professional structural headings

body.style: Optimized for maximum readability in paragraphs

code_and_data.style: High-fidelity, monospaced computational datasets and code samples

logo_concept.name: The Lattice Matrix
logo_concept.geometry: Hexagonal grid system (representing packing in crystalline structures)

elements.background_dots: Soft Grey points representing theoretical search boundaries
elements.active_path: Lab Teal path representing collaborative optimization tracking
elements.nodes: Terracotta Amber and Lab Teal circles marking highly optimized discovery coordinates

allowed: High-fidelity data visualizations (3D topological space mapping, optimization paths)
Macro-photography of hardware (plasma plumes, mechatronics control blocks, silicon wafers)
forbidden: Generic stock photos of scientists in lab coats holding colored liquids in beakers

editorial_guidelines.tone_of_voice: Transparent, Educational, Empowering, Authoritative yet approachable
editorial_guidelines.communication_style: Like a senior engineer sharing a breakthrough methodology with a peer. Focuses on multiplying capabilities and building ecosystems rather than enforcing vendor lock-in.
taglines: Empowering materials researchers through open-architecture automation.
Let's map your multi-dimensional chemical space.
